feed.title: AdameNotes
feed.subtitle: AdameNotes - Eduardo Adame's personal blog. Mathmatics and Data Science thoughts of a enthusiastic student.

entry.title: My First Day at College
entry.summary: What were my expectations about today? Well, yesterday I was really anxious about today. I thought I’d start the day with a Analytical Geometry class, at 7:30am. And, at 8:30am, I’d go to the school year beginning ceremony and there I’d meet all my classmates and teachers. When it was over, the next classes would be prepared for me (and my new classmates), and so I’d study Calculus and Computi...

entry.title: Hello World - Be Welcome
entry.summary: A new hello world. Hello, my dear visitor, be welcome. Today I’m starting a brand new project, my new blog. So, I think I have to present myself to you all. I am Eduardo Adame, I am 17 years old, and I love Math and Tech stuff. My main idea here is to share what I know about things I like - usually math-related. Alright, how will the blog work out? I haven’t said this right before, but I am ...
